message:
feat(vdbe): thread per-index collation sequences through query engine

Add `key_collations` field to `IndexSchema` so each index key term can
carry an explicit collation (e.g. NOCASE, RTRIM).  Plumb the mapping
from connection schema → runtime inputs → VdbeEngine so that
`compare_index_prefix_keys` receives real collations instead of the
previous empty placeholder.

Affected paths:
- codegen: IndexSchema gains `key_collations`, `key_term_collation()`
- engine: stores/retrieves collation map by root page, wires it into
  IdxGE/IdxLT comparison and Next/Prev duplicate-skip comparisons
- connection: builds `index_collations_by_root_page` from schema,
  passes through `TableExecutionRuntimeInputs`
- compat_persist: extracted unique-constraint indexes include the field

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
